$schema-note: Declarative comparison set for ilb-perf-import suite. Each entry maps to one .config.js in ./configs/.

competitors.purpose: Establish the floor — what does the codebase cost without any cycle detection at all
Industry incumbent — the baseline we beat to claim 'fastest'

competitors.algorithm: Tarjan SCC + DFS (Phase 6 final: per-import DFS + oxc-resolver)

competitors.purpose: Structural floor — zero plugin abstraction. Not publishable as a competitor (it's bespoke to one codebase) but useful as 'how fast is the irreducible minimum'
What snappy-client-dashboard ships today — measures the cost of the dual-rule status quo

addingCompetitor: 1) Add a .config.js under configs/. 2) Add an entry above. 3) Re-run the benchmark. 4) Commit the new dated JSON in results/.
